The '''''Gahenna''''' was a modified [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Core ship/Legends|core ship]], which had been outfitted as a science vessel.

==History==
Four months into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the ''Gahenna'' was loaded with a score of equipment from a secret [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] laboratory on [[Queyta]]; the facility where [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]'s [[swamp gas]] had been developed. For nearly two years, the ''Gahenna'' cruised the Outer Rim, developing a new strain of toxin — the defoliant [[Trihexalophine1138]]. Information about the weapon was stored aboard the ''Gahenna''{{'s}} [[Scientific Instrument Package]], or SIP.

In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the ''Gahenna'' was dispatched to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], where it was to test the new defoliant weapon. The Republic learned of the plan, however, and the ''Gahenna'' was [[Battle of Honoghr/Legends|brought down]] over [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]]. The ''Gahenna'' was destroyed, and its deadly cargo unleashed on the unsuspecting world.
